name: Mermaid CLI

evidence.claim: Mermaid CLI is a command-line interface for the Mermaid library that takes a mermaid definition file as input and generates an SVG/PNG/PDF file as output.
Search citation: Mermaid | Diagramming and charting tool
Search citation: Actually customize a theme · Issue #107 · mermaidjs/mermaid.cli

api_notes: The CLI provides a Node.js API that allows developers to programmatically execute the tool's core function: taking a Mermaid definition file as input and generating an SVG, PNG, or PDF file. It is not a platform-based REST or GraphQL API.
access_notes: The Mermaid CLI is an open-source tool distributed via npm, freely available to anyone without requiring registration, API keys, or accounts.
auth_notes: The tool is a local command-line and Node.js utility and does not utilize any web-based authentication methods like API keys or OAuth2.
mcp_notes: No official or community-maintained Model Context Protocol (MCP) server was found for the Mermaid CLI.
one_liner: Mermaid CLI is a command-line and Node.js tool used to convert Mermaid diagram definition files into SVG, PNG, or PDF output files.
